Swordfern Dieback Sample Analyses

2025-11-14

library(tidyverse)
## ── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
## ✔ dplyr     1.1.4     ✔ readr     2.1.6
## ✔ forcats   1.0.1     ✔ stringr   1.6.0
## ✔ ggplot2   4.0.1     ✔ tibble    3.3.1
## ✔ lubridate 1.9.4     ✔ tidyr     1.3.2
## ✔ purrr     1.2.1     
## ── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
## ✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
## ✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
## ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors
library(kableExtra)
## 
## Attaching package: 'kableExtra'
## 
## The following object is masked from 'package:dplyr':
## 
##     group_rows
setwd("~/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Core/Server Files/swordfern")
data <- read.csv("./data/lab/combined.results.csv")
data <- rename(data,Tentative.Result = Tentative.Results..Internal.NCBI.Oomcycete.including.voucher.blast.)
data <- data %>% filter(common_name=="western sword fern")
data$Tentative.Result[data$Tentative.Result=="Phytophthora europaea or abietivora?"] <- "Phytophthora sp."
data$Tentative.Result[data$Tentative.Result=="Phytophthora flexuosa?"] <- "Phytophthora sp."
data$Project <- as.factor(data$Project)
data$place_guess <- as.factor(data$place_guess)
data$Oomycete <- as.factor(data$Oomycete)
field.baits <- data %>% filter(Project=="Swordfern Soil Bait Isolates")
roots <- data %>% filter(Project=="Swordfern Roots")

Field Baits

Summary Tables

Number of Isolates

ggplot(field.baits[field.baits$Tentative.Result!="" & !is.na(field.baits$Tentative.Result),],aes(Tentative.Result,fill=Genus)) +geom_histogram(stat="count")+coord_flip() +theme_bw() +guides(fill="none") +theme(axis.text = element_text(face = "italic")) + labs(y="Number of Isolates")
## Warning in geom_histogram(stat = "count"): Ignoring unknown parameters:
## `binwidth` and `bins`

levels(field.baits$Oomycete)
## [1] ""         "Fungi"    "Oomycete"

Sample Collections

sample.summary <- field.baits %>% summarize(n.sites = n_distinct(place_guess,na.rm=TRUE),n.samples=n_distinct(Sample),n.isolates=n(),n.oomycete.isolates=sum(Oomycete=="Oomycete",na.rm=TRUE),n.oomycete.spec=n_distinct(Tentative.Result),n.Phytoph.isolates=sum(Genus=="Phytophthora",na.rm=TRUE),n.Phytoph.spec=n_distinct(Tentative.Result[Genus=="Phytophthora" & !is.na(Tentative.Result)]),Phytoph.spp=paste(unique(Tentative.Result[Genus=="Phytophthora" & !is.na(Tentative.Result)]),collapse=", "))

kable(sample.summary,digits = 2) %>% kable_material(c("striped", "hover","condensed")) %>% kable_styling(full_width = F) %>% scroll_box(height = "400px")
n.sites n.samples n.isolates n.oomycete.isolates n.oomycete.spec n.Phytoph.isolates n.Phytoph.spec Phytoph.spp
12 104 189 108 18 34 10 Phytophthora syringae, Phytophthora sp., Phytophthora megasperma, Phytophthora plurivora, Phytophthora cactorum, Phytophthora pseudosyringae, Phytophthora cambivora, Phytophthora obscura, Phytophthora attenuata, Phytophthora nemrosa

Phytophthora Isolates

Phytophthora.summary <- field.baits %>% filter(Genus=="Phytophthora") %>% summarize(n.sites = n_distinct(place_guess,na.rm=TRUE),n.samples=n_distinct(Sample),n.isolates=n(),n.oomycete.isolates=sum(Oomycete=="Oomycete",na.rm=TRUE),n.oomycete.spec=n_distinct(Tentative.Result),n.Phytoph.isolates=sum(Genus=="Phytophthora",na.rm=TRUE),n.Phytoph.spec=n_distinct(Tentative.Result[Genus=="Phytophthora" & !is.na(Tentative.Result)]),Phytoph.spp=paste(unique(Tentative.Result[Genus=="Phytophthora" & !is.na(Tentative.Result)]),collapse=", "))

kable(Phytophthora.summary,digits = 2) %>% kable_material(c("striped", "hover","condensed")) %>% kable_styling(full_width = F) %>% scroll_box(height = "400px")
n.sites n.samples n.isolates n.oomycete.isolates n.oomycete.spec n.Phytoph.isolates n.Phytoph.spec Phytoph.spp
8 28 34 34 10 34 10 Phytophthora syringae, Phytophthora sp., Phytophthora megasperma, Phytophthora plurivora, Phytophthora cactorum, Phytophthora pseudosyringae, Phytophthora cambivora, Phytophthora obscura, Phytophthora attenuata, Phytophthora nemrosa

Samples per ‘place guess’

site.summary <- field.baits %>% group_by(place_guess) %>% summarize(n.samples=n_distinct(Sample),n.isolates=n(),n.oomycete.isolates=sum(Oomycete=="Oomycete",na.rm=TRUE),n.oomycete.spec=n_distinct(Tentative.Result),n.Phytoph.isolates=sum(Genus=="Phytophthora",na.rm=TRUE),n.Phytoph.spec=n_distinct(Tentative.Result[Genus=="Phytophthora" & !is.na(Tentative.Result)]),Phytoph.spp=paste(unique(Tentative.Result[Genus=="Phytophthora" & !is.na(Tentative.Result)]),collapse=", "))
kable(site.summary,digits = 2) %>% kable_material(c("striped", "hover","condensed")) %>% kable_styling(full_width = F) %>% scroll_box(height = "400px")
place_guess n.samples n.isolates n.oomycete.isolates n.oomycete.spec n.Phytoph.isolates n.Phytoph.spec Phytoph.spp
Bainbridge Island, Bainbridge Island, WA, US 6 9 6 5 1 1 Phytophthora syringae
Blakely Harbor, Bainbridge Island, WA, US 9 17 11 7 2 2 Phytophthora syringae, Phytophthora megasperma
Four Hundred Sixty-Second Street East, Eatonville, WA, US 4 10 7 4 5 2 Phytophthora plurivora, Phytophthora cactorum
Keller Ln, Port Ludlow, WA, US 1 2 2 1 0 0
Mercer Island, Mercer Island, WA, US 16 30 18 8 5 2 Phytophthora syringae, Phytophthora sp.
Morganmarsh Ln W, Seabeck, WA, US 13 18 8 5 0 0
NE Mountain Lake Dr, Belfair, WA, US 12 23 17 11 5 4 Phytophthora obscura, Phytophthora pseudosyringae, Phytophthora plurivora, Phytophthora attenuata
Oak Bay Rd, Port Ludlow, WA, US 4 6 4 4 0 0
Olympic Pl, Port Ludlow, WA, US 2 4 1 2 0 0
SE 158th St, Issaquah, WA, US 13 29 12 11 6 5 Phytophthora pseudosyringae, Phytophthora plurivora, Phytophthora cambivora, Phytophthora syringae, Phytophthora sp.
Seward Park, Seattle, WA, US 15 24 16 8 8 2 Phytophthora syringae, Phytophthora sp.
Tradition Plateau NRCA, Issaquah, WA, US 9 17 6 6 2 2 Phytophthora plurivora, Phytophthora nemrosa 
species.summary <- field.baits %>% filter(!is.na(Tentative.Result) & Tentative.Result!="") %>% group_by(Tentative.Result) %>% summarize(n.sites = n_distinct(place_guess,na.rm=TRUE),n.samples = n_distinct(Sample,na.rm=TRUE),n.isolates=n(),Genus=paste(unique(Genus))) 
species.summary
## # A tibble: 16 × 5
##    Tentative.Result              n.sites n.samples n.isolates Genus           
##    <chr>                           <int>     <int>      <int> <chr>           
##  1 "Elongisporangium anandrum "        5         8         12 Elongisporangium
##  2 "Globisporangium debaryanum"        6         8         11 Globisporangium 
##  3 "Globisporangium intermedium"       7        15         16 Globisporangium 
##  4 "Phytophthora attenuata"            1         1          1 Phytophthora    
##  5 "Phytophthora cactorum"             1         1          1 Phytophthora    
##  6 "Phytophthora cambivora"            1         1          2 Phytophthora    
##  7 "Phytophthora megasperma"           1         1          1 Phytophthora    
##  8 "Phytophthora nemrosa"              1         1          1 Phytophthora    
##  9 "Phytophthora obscura"              1         1          1 Phytophthora    
## 10 "Phytophthora plurivora"            4         6          7 Phytophthora    
## 11 "Phytophthora pseudosyringae"       2         3          3 Phytophthora    
## 12 "Phytophthora sp."                  3         4          4 Phytophthora    
## 13 "Phytophthora syringae"             5        11         13 Phytophthora    
## 14 "Phytopythium sp. 1"                2         2          2 Phytopythium    
## 15 "Pythium attrantheridium"           9        23         27 Pythium         
## 16 "Pythium senticosum"                3         6          6 Pythium
ggplot(species.summary,aes(Tentative.Result,n.sites,fill=Genus)) +geom_col() +theme_bw() +coord_flip() + guides(fill=FALSE) +theme(axis.text = element_text(face = "italic")) +labs(x="Species",y="Number of Sites (e.g. Seward Park)")
## Warning: The `<scale>` argument of `guides()` cannot be `FALSE`. Use "none" instead as
## of ggplot2 3.3.4.
## This warning is displayed once per session.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.

ggplot(species.summary,aes(Tentative.Result,n.samples,fill=Genus)) +geom_col() +theme_bw() +coord_flip() + guides(fill=FALSE) +theme(axis.text = element_text(face = "italic")) +labs(x="Species",y="Number of Samples")
